concerns.title: Chronic Fatigue / Low Energy
concerns.description: Feelings of constant tiredness, low stamina, brain fog, or difficulty getting through the day.

concerns.title: Weight Gain / Metabolic Dysfunction
concerns.description: Difficulty losing weight, especially around the midsection, slow metabolism, or concerns about blood sugar/insulin.

concerns.title: Hormonal Imbalance
concerns.description: Symptoms such as low libido, mood changes, hot flashes, PMS, low testosterone, or other hormone-related concerns.

concerns.title: Chronic Pain and Inflammation
concerns.description: Ongoing pain, stiffness, joint pain, back pain, or inflammation that interferes with daily activities.

concerns.title: Poor Sleep / Insomnia
concerns.description: Trouble falling asleep, staying asleep, or waking up feeling unrefreshed and tired.

concerns.title: Brain Fog / Cognitive Decline
concerns.description: Difficulty with memory, concentration, focus, or mental clarity.

concerns.title: Stress, Anxiety, and Burnout
concerns.description: High stress levels, anxiety, irritability, or feeling overwhelmed and unable to recharge.

concerns.title: Gastrointestinal / Gut Health Issues
concerns.description: Bloating, constipation, reflux, IBS-like symptoms, or food sensitivities.

concerns.title: Immune Dysfunction / Frequent Illness
concerns.description: Getting sick often, slow healing, chronic inflammation, or autoimmune-type symptoms.

concerns.title: Aging / Longevity Optimization
concerns.description: Desire to improve overall vitality, prevent age-related decline, and optimize long-term health and longevity.
